item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 151830Z AUTO 36006KT 310V030 9999 -RA FEW030/// SCT064/// BKN160/// ///CB 22/19 Q1017 TEMPO VRB15G40KT 4000 BR BECMG NSC
🟡 TAF LFOT 151700Z 1518/1618 VRB05KT CAVOK TEMPO 1518/1520 VRB15G40KT 4000 -TSRA BKN080CB PROB30 1520/1606 4000 BR TEMPO 1612/1618 VRB10G20KT FEW080CB PROB40 TEMPO 1612/1618 -TSRA SCT080CB PROB30 TEMPO 1612/1618 VRB15G30KT 3000 TSRAGR BKN070CB
